<ref name="17 generations">https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/十七世神</ref>
<ref name="Izumo clan">https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/出雲国造</ref>
<ref name="17 generations" />
<ref name="Izumo clan" />
{{chart top|template_name=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|{{{title|{{ill|Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|lt=Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|simple|User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventeen Generations of Earthly Deities|qq=}}}}}}}{{familytree/start|style = font-size:80%| summary=Boxes and lines diagram with 75 boxes}}
{{chart/start}}


{{chart|border=1| | | | | | |Oya  | | |Sus  | Oya={{nowrap| [[Ōyamatsumi]]<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=132 |title=Ōyamatsumi |first=Nakayama |last=Kaoru |date=7 May 2005 |publisher=Encyclopedia of Shinto |access-date=2010-09-29}}</ref><!--sources for Ukanomitama lineage--><ref name="chamberlain-1882" /><ref name="chamberlain-1882-2" />}}| boxstyle_Oya=background:lightblue;| Sus={{nowrap| [[Susanoo-no-Mikoto|Susanoo]]<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=143 |title=Susanoo |first=Kadoya |last=Atsushi |date=10 May 2005 |publisher=Encyclopedia of Shinto |access-date=2010-09-29}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.britannica.com/topic/Susanoo|title=Susanoo &#124; Description & Mythology|website=Encyclopedia Britannica}}</ref><ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|277}}}}| boxstyle_Sus=background:lightblue;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |,|-|-|v|-|^|-|v|-|-|t|-|-|.}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | |!| | | |!| | |)|-|v|Kamu | Kamu={{nowrap| [[Kamuo Ichihime]]<!--sources for Ukanomitama lineage--><ref name="chamberlain-1882" /><ref name="chamberlain-1882-2" /><!--Toshigami sources--><ref name="kotobank-2023">{{cite web|url=https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%A4%A7%E5%B9%B4%E7%A5%9E-450354|script-title=ja:大年神|trans-title=Ōtoshi-no-kami|publisher=[[Kotobank]]|language=ja|access-date=5 May 2023|archive-date=5 June 2023|archive-url=https://archive.today/20230605234250/https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%A4%A7%E5%B9%B4%E7%A5%9E-450354|url-status=live}}</ref><ref name="kokugakuin-university-2023">{{cite web|url=http://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/otoshinokami/|script-title=ja:大年神|trans-title=Ōtoshi-no-kami|publisher=[[Kokugakuin University]]|language=ja|access-date=5 May 2023|archive-date=5 June 2023|archive-url=https://archive.today/20230605235208/http://kojiki.kokugakuin.ac.jp/shinmei/otoshinokami/|url-status=live}}</ref>}}| boxstyle_Kamu=background:pink;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | |!| | | |!| | |!| |)|-|-|-|.}}
{{chart|border=1| |Kon2 |Ash  |y|Tan  | |!|Toshi| |Uka  | Kon2=[[Konohanachiru-hime]]<ref name="mori">{{Cite web |last=Mori |first=Mizue |title=Yashimajinumi |url=https://d-museum.kokugakuin.ac.jp/eos/detail/?id=9724 |website=[[Kokugakuin University]] Encyclopedia of Shinto}}</ref><ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|277}}| boxstyle_Kon2=background:pink;| Ash=[[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi|Ashinazuchi]]<ref>{{cite book | last=Frédéric | first=L. | author2=Louis-Frédéric | last3=Roth | first3=K. | title=Japan Encyclopedia | publisher=Belknap Press of Harvard University Press | series=Harvard University Press reference library | year=2005 | isbn=978-0-674-01753-5 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC | access-date=2020-11-21 }}</ref><ref name="www2kokugakuinacjp-2023">{{Cite web |title=My Shinto: Personal Descriptions of Japanese Religion and Culture |url=https://www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp/~n-havens/myshinto/htmlfile/mmori02.html |access-date=2023-10-16 |website=www2.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>| boxstyle_Ash=background:lightblue;| Tan=[[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi|Tenazuchi]]<ref name="www2kokugakuinacjp-2023" />| boxstyle_Tan=background:pink;| Toshi={{nowrap|[[Toshigami]]<ref name="kokugakuin-university-2023"/><ref name="kotobank-2023"/>}}| boxstyle_Toshi=background:lightblue;| Uka={{nowrap|[[Ukanomitama]]<ref name="chamberlain-1882">Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj026.htm Section XIX.—The Palace of Suga.]</ref><ref name="chamberlain-1882-2">Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-of-the-Great-Land.]</ref><br>([[:en:Inari Ōkami|Inari]])<ref>“‘My Own Inari’: Personalization of the Deity in Inari Worship.” ''Japanese Journal of Religious Studies'' 23, no. 1/2 (1996): 87-88</ref>}}| boxstyle_Uka=background:pink;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!| | | | |!| |!}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!| | | | |!|Sann | Sann={{nowrap|[[:en:Oyamakui no Kami|Oyamakui]]<ref>{{Cite web |date=2022-08-17 |title=Ōtoshi {{!}} 國學院大學デジタルミュージアム |url=https://d-museum.kokugakuin.ac.jp/eos/detail/?id=9164 |access-date=2023-11-14 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220817071922/https://d-museum.kokugakuin.ac.jp/eos/detail/?id=9164 |archive-date=2022-08-17 }}</ref>}}| boxstyle_Sann=background:silver;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | | |Kush |-|-|-|(| Kush=[[Kushinadahime]]<ref name="www2kokugakuinacjp-2023" /><ref>{{Cite web|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=102|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Kushinadahime|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref><ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|277}}| boxstyle_Kush=background:pink;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | | | | | | |!}}
{{chart|border=1| | |`|-|-|-|-|v|-|-|-|AS   | AS=[[Yashimajinumi]]<ref name="mori"/><ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|277}}| boxstyle_AS=background:lightblue;}}
{{chart|border=1| | | | | | | |!}}
{{chart|border=1| |Kag  | | | |!| Kag=[[Kagu-tsuchi|Kagutsuchi]]<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.worldhistory.org/Kagutsuchi/|title=Kagutsuchi|website=[[World History Encyclopedia]]}}</ref>| boxstyle_Kag=background:lightblue;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!}}
{{chart|border=1| |K1   | | | |!| K1=[[Kuraokami]]<ref>{{cite book | last=Ashkenazi | first=M. | title=Handbook of Japanese Mythology | publisher=ABC-CLIO | series=Handbooks of world mythology | year=2003 | isbn=978-1-57607-467-1 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=gqs-y9R2AekC&pg=PA213 | access-date=2020-11-21 | page=213}}</ref>| boxstyle_K1=background:lightblue;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | |!}}
{{chart|border=1| |TA   |-|v|YA   | TA={{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|qq=}}<ref> {{cite book | last=Chamberlain | first=B.H. | title=Kojiki: Records of Ancient Matters | publisher=Tuttle Publishing | series=Tuttle Classics | year=2012 | isbn=978-1-4629-0511-9 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=jf_PAgAAQBAJ | access-date=2020-11-21 }} </ref><ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_TA=background:pink;| YA={{ill|Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuha-no-Mojikunusunu|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010">{{cite book | last=Herbert | first=J. | title=Shinto: At the Fountainhead of Japan | publisher=Taylor & Francis | series=Routledge Library Editions: Japan | year=2010 | isbn=978-1-136-90376-2 | url=https://books.google.com/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT402 | access-date=2020-11-21 | page=402}}</ref>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_YA=background:lightblue;}}
{{chart|border=1| | | | | |!}}
{{chart|border=1| | | | |FU2  |y|Ame3 | |FO   | FU2={{ill|Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fukabuchi-no-Mizuyarehana|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_FU2=background:lightblue;| Ame3={{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_Ame3=background:pink;| FO={{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funozuno|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_FO=background:lightgray}}
{{chart|border=1| | | | | | | |!| | | | | |!}}
{{chart|border=1| |Sash | | |Om   |~|y|~|Fu2  | Sash={{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|lt=Sashikuni Ōkami|lt=Sashikuni Okami|ja|刺国大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Okami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Okami|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_Sash=background:lightblue;| Om=[[:en:Omizunu|Omizunu]]<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_Om=background:lightblue;| Fu2={{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_Fu2=background:pink;}}
{{chart|border=1| | |!| | | | | | | |!}}
{{chart|border=1| ||!  || |,|-|-|-|-|'| |  | | | |Tak  | aah={{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_aah=background:pink;| Amef=[[Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref><ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_Amef=background:lightblue;| Tak=[[Takamimusubi]]<ref name="ponsonbyfane-2014" /><ref name="eoskokugakuinacjp-2021" />| boxstyle_Tak=background:silver;}}

{{chart|border=1| | |!| | |!| | | | |}}
{{chart| aah |y| Amef  | | FIL | | | | IMP |IMP=Imperial
 |HUS=My brother Joe
 |FIL={{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|1=Yashimamuji|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami}}
| aah={{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime|qq=}}<ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_aah=background:pink;| Amef=[[Ame-no-Fuyukinu]]<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref><ref name="herbert-2010"/>{{rp|278}}| boxstyle_Amef=background:lightblue;| Tak=[[Takamimusubi]]<ref name="ponsonbyfane-2014" /><ref name="eoskokugakuinacjp-2021" />| boxstyle_Tak=background:silver;}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Ame-no-oshihomimi]]
 |HUS={{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Tottori-no-Kami|ja|鳥取神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL=Father-in-law
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Ame no Hohi|lt2=Heavenly Spike-Day no Mikoto|ja|天穂日命|en|10=fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノホヒ}}<sup>1</sup>'''<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji=PLACEHOLDER
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=Imperial
 |HUS={{ill|Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinateri-Nukada-Bichio-Ikochini-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL=Father-in-law
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Takehi-Nateru|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru}}<sup>2</sup>'''<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Ame-no-Oshikumone|en|Draft:Ame-no-Oshikumone|ja|天押雲根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshikumone|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|Izumo='''{{ill|Kushiyatamanokami|lt=Kushiyatamanokami|ja|櫛八玉神|lt_ja=伊佐我命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushiyatamanokami|1=Kushiyatama-no-kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q86734749}}<ref name="Izumo clan" /><ref>https://books.google.ca/books?id=Sg_JBQAAQBAJ&pg=PT440&lpg=PT440&dq=Kushiyatamanokami&source=bl&ots=_qW3Xm0KGN&sig=ACfU3U2v5Anud1CSmKUUaL3C-dvsdpg7FQ&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiX6YL8qc-FAxVjCTQIHZTXDN0Q6AF6BAgJEAM</ref><sup>3</sup>'''||IMP=[[Jimmmu]]
 |HUS={{ill|Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami|ja|国忍富神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuninotoshimi-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Ashinataka-no-Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL={{ill|Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Amenotaneko|ja|天種子命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenotaneko|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Suizei]]
 |HUS={{ill|Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike-no-Takekasayanosunumi-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL={{ill|Kuraokami|en|Kuraokami|qid=Q644201|lt=Kuraokami|1=Kuraokami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Tsusahime no Mikoto|lt=Tsusahime no Mikoto|ja|津狭命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsusahime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579354|1=Tsusahime no Mikoto}}<sup>4</sup>'''<br/><sup><ref name="Izumo clan" /><ref group="*">({{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q20Izumo88|lt=Jimmu's Era}})</ref></sup>
 |Fuji={{ill|Usami no Mikoto|ja|宇佐臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usami no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Annei]]
 |HUS={{ill|Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami|ja|甕主日子神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi-no-Hiko-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL={{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|1=Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Kushifusakinomikoto|lt=Kushifusakinomi|ja|櫛瓺前命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushifusakinomikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579355|1=Kushifusakinomikoto}}<ref name="Izumo clan" /><sup>5</sup>'''
 |Fuji={{ill|Mishokutsuomi no Mikoto|ja|御食津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mishokutsuomi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135505720|1=Mishokutsuomi no Mikoto}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Itoku]]
 |HUS={{ill|Tahiriki-Shimarumi-no-Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL={{ill|Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Kushitsukinomikoto|lt=Kushitsuki no Mikoto|ja|櫛月命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushitsukinomikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579356|1=Kushitsukinomikoto}}<ref name="Izumo clan" /><sup>6</sup>'''
 |Fuji={{ill|Igatsuomi no Mikoto|ja|伊賀津臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Igatsuomi no Mikoto|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Kōshō]]
 |HUS={{ill|Mironami-no-Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonuma-Mashi-no-Maou-hime}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL=Father-in-law
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Kushichitoriuminomikoto|lt=Kushichitoriumi no Mikoto|ja|櫛瓺鳥海命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushichitoriuminomikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579358|1=Kushichitoriuminomikoto}}<sup>7</sup>'''<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Nashitomi|ja|梨迹臣命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nashitomi|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Kōan]]
 |HUS={{ill|Nunobutomi-Torinarumi-no-Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL={{ill|Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Kushidanomikoto|lt=Kushida no Mikoto|ja|櫛田命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushidanomikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579359|1=Kushidanomikoto}}<sup>8</sup>'''<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Kamikikikatsu|ja|神聞勝命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikikatsu|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Kōrei]]
 |HUS={{ill|Ame-no-Hibaraooshinadomi-no-Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF={{ill|Totsumatone-no-Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |FIL=Father-in-law
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Chirinomikoto|lt=Chiri no Mikoto|ja|知理命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chirinomikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579360|1=Chirinomikoto}}<sup>9</sup>'''<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Kushiukameshi no Mikoto|ja|久志宇賀主命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kushiukameshi no Mikoto|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Kōgen]]
 |HUS={{ill|Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyami-Sakitara-no-Kami}}<ref name="17 generations" />
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Yomorosunomikoto|lt=Yomorosu no Mikoto|ja|世毛呂須命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yomorosunomikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579361|1=Yomorosunomikoto}}<sup>10</sup>'''<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|lt=Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|lt=Kuninazu no oukashima|ja|国摩大鹿島命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no oukashima|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}

{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Kōgen]]
 |HUS=Son<ref name="My speculations" />
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Ada no Mikoto|ja|阿多命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ada no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579362|1=Ada no Mikoto}}'''<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Omikiyama no Mikoto|ja|臣狭山命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omikiyama no Mikoto|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}

{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Kaika]]
 |HUS=Grandson<ref name="My speculations">My speculations of identification of Otataneko</ref>
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo={{ill|Amami Haniyasu no Mikoto|lt=Amami Haniyasu no Mikoto|ja|甘美韓日狭|lt_ja=甘美韓日狭命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amami Haniyasu no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji={{ill|Nakatomi no Ikatsu|ja|中臣烏賊津|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Ikatsu|qq=}}<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}

{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Sujin]]
 |HUS={{ill|Ōtataneko|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtataneko|qq=}}<ref name="My speculations" />
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo='''{{ill|Nomi no Sukune|en|Nomi no Sukune|qid=Q965742|lt=Nomi no Sukune|1=Nomi no Sukune}}'''<br/><sup>{{ill|Haji clan|en|Haji clan|qid=Q10927758|lt=Ancestor of Haji Clan|1=Haji clan}} Ancestor</sup><ref name="Izumo clan" />
 |Fuji=O-o-obase-no-mikoto (大小橋命)<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}

{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Suinin]]
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Amahisa-no-kimi<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Keikō]]
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Abiko<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Yamato Takeru]]
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Mahito<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Chūai]]
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Kamako<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=[[Ōjin]]
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Kuroda<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Tokiwa<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}

{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Katanoko<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}
{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji=Nakatomi no Mikeko<ref name="Kasuga" />
}}
{{chart| |,|-|'| |,|-|-|-|'| | | | | |!|!|!}}
{{chart| HUS |y| WIF  | | FIL | | | | IMP |Izumo|Fuji|IMP=
 |HUS=
 |WIF=
 |FIL=
 |Izumo=
 |Fuji='''{{ill|Fujiwara no Kamatari|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Kamatari|qq=}}''' ({{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara clan|qq=}} progenitor)<ref name="Kasuga" /><ref name="Brinkley">[[FRank Brinkley|Brinkley, FRank]] and [[:en:Dairoku Kikuchi|Dairoku Kikuchi]]. (1915). ''A History of the Japanese People from the Earliest Times to the End of the Meiji Era.'' New York: Encyclopædia Britannica. [https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/413099 OCLC 413099]</ref>
}}

{{chart/end}}
{{chart/end}}

== See Also ==

* [[Template:Generations of Jimmu]]
* [[Template:Generations of Watatsumi]]
* [[Template:Eight generations of Izumo]]
* [[Ōnakatomi clan]]

== References ==

<references />[[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
